title: Audit Pinake interface flows and design principles
description:
Create a focused UX/UI and visual design audit for the Pinake VS Code extension interface.

Scope the native sidebar, creation wizard, module picker, search results, validation output, properties output, command feedback, and empty states. The outcome should define modern, intuitive, minimalist, and functional design principles that future implementation tasks can follow without introducing a custom webview.

checklist.text: Inventory every user-facing interface surface in the extension.
Document friction points in the sidebar, commands, prompts, and feedback messages.
Define UX principles for native VS Code feel, minimal chrome, predictable actions, and clear states.
Capture acceptance notes for Light, Dark, and High Contrast themes.
Record implementation-ready recommendations without requiring a custom webview.
